[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111000000 3
1 100001111 5
2 101100110 5
3 001111000 4
4 101111110 7
5 101101111 7
6 001001010 3
7 110010000 3

01 10 101101110 6
12 21 001001010 3 match 6
23 32 000000000 a
34 43 110010000 3 match 7
45 54 100001000 2
56 65 100000110 3
67 76 001100000 2
70 07 001111000 4 match 3

02 20 001001010 3 match 6
13 31 100000000 1
24 42 000001000 1
35 53 100000000 1
46 64 100100000 2
57 75 000001000 1
60 06 101100110 5 match 2
71 17 001101000 3

36 63 100000000 1

50 05 100001110 4
61 16 101100110 5 match 2
72 27 001001000 2

37 73 000010000 1
